heading: // Notifications
empty: No notification channels configured. Add one to receive alerts.

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Send alerts to a Slack channel via incoming webhook

email.name: Email
email.description: Send alerts via SMTP to one or more recipients

webhook.name: Webhook
webhook.description: POST alert payloads to any HTTP endpoint

ntfy.name: ntfy
ntfy.description: Push notifications via ntfy.sh or a self-hosted ntfy server

gotify.name: Gotify
gotify.description: Push notifications via a self-hosted Gotify server

deleteDialog.title: Delete Channel
deleteDialog.body: This will permanently remove the channel {name}. This action cannot be undone.
